## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] `gofmt -w .` was run.
- [ ] `go test ./...` was run.
- [ ] `go vet ./...` was run.
- [ ] No tokens, secrets, private IDs, payment payloads, Passport data, or token-bearing URLs are included.
- [ ] Official Telegram Bot API documentation is linked for API surface changes.
- [ ] Breaking changes or compatibility risks are documented.
- [ ] Public text is English.
